info.title: Queue Coordinator Service
info.description: Manages clinic queue: check-in, call-next, deprioritize, and real-time WebSocket updates

doctor_id.description: Set at booking time for specific-doctor bookings. For generic queue patients (null at booking), written back when the doctor calls /call-next.

approaching_notified_at.description: Timestamp when the patient was notified that their turn is approaching (≤3 positions ahead). Null until notification fires; prevents re-firing on subsequent queue ticks.

get.summary: List all active queue entries (staff view)
Get queue position for a patient's appointment

409.description: Cannot check in at this status

post.description: Selects the next checked-in patient using time-aware priority: (1) specific bookings for this doctor whose start_time has arrived are called first, (2) generic queue patients fill gaps between due slots, (3) specific bookings not yet due are called as a fallback if nothing else is ready. For generic patients, doctor_id is written back to their queue entry at this point.

doctor_id.description: Doctor's BetterAuth nanoid. When provided, prioritises that doctor's specific bookings over generic queue patients.

404.description: Appointment not found or cannot be completed
Appointment not found or already resolved

post.summary: Move patient to back of queue and set status to checked_in (late arrival penalty)

get.summary: Get currently called patient for a doctor

post.summary: Reset queue at start of day
